findings.description: Vocabulary scan: 0 unsafe words (enforcement, override, orchestration, execution, closure, replay, escalation)
Code inspection: artifact_store.put() called with immutable=True for all policy entries. No post-creation edits possible
All exceptions emit error_artifact via _emit_error_artifact(). No silent failures. Fail-closed enforced
Test suite: 10 tests covering policy creation, schema validation, error cases, hidden logic audit. All pass
Audit scans work: grep patterns detect hardcoded thresholds (if.*>.*0\.\d+) and prompt logic (should.*block, must.*allow)

approval_comment: Implementation matches design. Vocabulary safe. Immutability enforced. All tests pass (ran 5x for flakiness). Approved for commit.
